description: Phase 39: Launch Mechanics - Create marketing site app, documentation site, status page, help center content, community configuration, and mobile app submission timeline docs.
steps: Create apps/marketing/ directory with package.json (@quant/marketing, React + Vite + Tailwind), tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts

Create apps/marketing/src/pages/ with: HomePage.tsx (hero, features grid, social proof, CTA), PricingPage.tsx (free/pro/enterprise tiers), FeaturesPage.tsx (13 app showcase), SecurityPage.tsx (E2EE, local-first, privacy), AboutPage.tsx
Create apps/marketing/src/components/ with: Header.tsx, Footer.tsx, FeatureCard.tsx, PricingCard.tsx, CTASection.tsx, TestimonialCard.tsx, AppShowcase.tsx
Create apps/status/ directory with package.json (@quant/status), tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts
Create apps/status/src/types.ts with: ServiceStatus, Incident, StatusPage, UptimeMetric interfaces
Create apps/status/src/status-engine.ts with: StatusEngine class (service health aggregation, incident management, uptime calculation, status page data generation, webhook notifications)
Create docs/site/ directory with: config.ts (documentation site structure), index.md (home), getting-started.md, api-reference.md, architecture.md
Create docs/site/guides/ with: quickstart.md, authentication.md, ai-integration.md, real-time.md, deployment.md
Create docs/help-center/ with: index.md, faq.md, troubleshooting.md, account-management.md, privacy-security.md

Create docs/community/ with: channels.md (Discord, GitHub Discussions, forum links), contributing.md, code-of-conduct.md, open-source-policy.md (what gets open-sourced: packages/common, packages/realtime, packages/testing)
Create docs/mobile-submission/ with: timeline.md (iOS App Store + Google Play submission checklist, review timelines, screenshot requirements, metadata), ios-checklist.md, android-checklist.md
Update apps/quant-mobile/src/index.ts to add app store metadata exports (version, build number, store listing info)
Add marketing and status to pnpm-workspace.yaml if needed (already covered by apps/* glob)
acceptance_criteria: Marketing site app typechecks and builds with pages for home, pricing, features, security, about
Status page app typechecks and builds with StatusEngine for health aggregation
Documentation site structure exists with getting-started, API reference, architecture docs
Help center content covers FAQ, troubleshooting, account management, privacy
Community docs define channels, contributing guide, open-source policy
Mobile submission docs have iOS and Android checklists with timelines
pnpm typecheck passes for all new apps
pnpm test passes for marketing and status apps
findings: Fixed noUnusedLocals error in apps/status/src/status-engine.ts. Added missing docs: community/code-of-conduct.md, community/open-source-policy.md, mobile-submission/ directory with timeline.md, ios-checklist.md, android-checklist.md.
